description: Create packages/data-pipeline/ - a production Redis Streams-based event streaming infrastructure with consumer groups, dead letter queue, and 3 processors (analytics, notification, indexing). Wire into admin (publish analytics), ws-gateway (publish connection events), and search-indexer (consume indexing events).
steps: Create packages/data-pipeline/package.json with name @quant/data-pipeline, deps: ioredis, zod, pino, @quant/common. Scripts: build (tsc), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), lint (eslint .)
Create packages/data-pipeline/tsconfig.json extending root pattern (see packages/queue/tsconfig.json as reference)
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/types.ts with StreamEvent, ConsumerGroup, ProcessorConfig, ProcessorHandler, DeadLetterEntry types

Create packages/data-pipeline/src/event-stream.ts - EventStream class using ioredis XADD/XREADGROUP/XACK: publish(stream, event), subscribe(stream, group, handler) with consumer group creation, acknowledge(stream, group, id)
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/dead-letter.ts - DeadLetterQueue class that stores failed events with retry metadata, allows replay, keeps stats
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/processors/analytics-processor.ts - processes page_view, click, session_start, session_end events, aggregates into time-bucketed counters
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/processors/notification-processor.ts - processes notification events, batches for delivery, respects user preferences
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/processors/indexing-processor.ts - forwards index events to search service, handles bulk operations
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/index.ts barrel export for EventStream, DeadLetterQueue, all processors, and types
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/__tests__/event-stream.test.ts - test publish/subscribe/acknowledge with mocked ioredis
Create packages/data-pipeline/src/__tests__/processors.test.ts - test each processor handles events correctly
acceptance_criteria: pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/data-pipeline passes with all tests green
findings: All 4 acceptance criteria met: typecheck, build, test (36 tests), lint all pass. Prettier reformatted via pre-commit hook. No eslint.config.mjs existed in packages/queue so used root eslint.config.mjs pattern. Node 22 via nvm required for pnpm. pnpm-lock.yaml updated as part of install.
